programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Comienzan las vacaciones y en el primer día en la casa shore se reúnen los viejos y nuevos integrantes para comenzar unas vacaciones de locura. El regreso a la casa original parece tener efecto en sus habitantes y los nuevos romances.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Luego de una primera noche salvaje, los Shore deciden pasar una tarde tranquila en la playa en donde aprovechan para hablar de lo sucedido la noche anterior y conocerse mejor. Llega la noche, los tragos, la fiesta y comienza la competencia.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Llega el nuevo "Boss" a la casa y los Shore descubren que sus obligaciones no son nada parecidas a lo que esperaban. Después de un día de trabajo nada mejor que unos drinks y lo que parecía una fiesta tranquila, termina en una noche de locura.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Luego del accidente de Fernando, Potro decide acompañarlo al hospital y las consecuencias de su caída no se hacen esperar. Una vez más llega el "Boss" a la casa para enviar a los Shore a un nuevo trabajo.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Comienza un nuevo día en la casa Shore y la llegada del Boss emociona a casi todos los integrantes de las casa quienes salen a disfrutar de un nuevo y divertido día laboral. Al caer la noche los Shore deciden ir a un sitio más tranquilo.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Una invitada colombiana llega a la casa shore mientras Fernando tiene que irse de Acapulco para ver a su medico y decidir si puede terminar sus vacaciones en familia. Todo esta listo para la iniciación de los nuevos integrantes de la casa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Erick llega a la casa Shore e inmediatamente empieza el coqueteo con una de las nuevas integrantes. La fiesta comienza y las comadres deciden pasar el día esposadas. Por fin llega la iniciación de los nuevos integrantes.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Cintia cada vez aguanta menos la actitud de las comadres y decide terminar sus vacaciones. Una vez mas llega el boss y les anuncia que su próximo trabajo va a ser en Chihuahua.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.desc: Mom Kelly says Ellie, 16, is on a path of self-destruction, & she fears for her daughter's life. Ellie has an eating disorder, is suicidal, cuts herself & has overdosed on drugs while lashing out in anger on a daily basis. Dr. Phil helps set a new path.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Things heat up as Tiffany's brother accuses mom Wanda of stealing his wife's wedding rings! Plus, find out what Tiffany says to cause her dad to jump out of his seat in the audience & make his way to stage. Can Dr. Phil help this family communicate? Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Bridget says she's not sure what to believe about the relationship between her 38-year-old brother-in-law, Kevin, and 16-year-old daughter, Grace. Dr. Phil sits down one-on-one with Kevin. How does Kevin explain his actions? Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with couple Jennifer & Billy. She claims the family is targeted by "hackers". Billy says it's her doing the hacking. Billy decides to walk out on the relationship, but enroute to airport, Dr. Phil producers get a desperate call. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: How did 21-year-old Jenna go from being a straight-A UC Berkeley student and former beauty queen to abusing heroin and meth and used as sexual currency in a drug house? Her mom is desperate to save her only child and turns to Dr. Phil for intervention.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Melisa says her estranged husband, Chris, is a pathological liar. Chris admits he has a problem with telling the truth and insists he wants to change -- but does he really? What's at the root of Chris' behavior? Should Melisa stay or call it quits?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Trust has been ranked as the #1 crucial quality for a happy marriage. Deanne & Brian have been married for 12 years with four children between them. Now, due to alleged lies and infidelity, their family is torn apart and divorce is just a signature away.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Learn how to tear down barriers and live with "No Fear In The New Year!" Son Gabriel says his mom, Linda, is crazy, intrusive, "religious to the extreme" causing unnecessary drama. Dr. Phil explains the "Why Lie" that he says guest Linda is hiding behind.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: While battling cancer, Paula learned her 21-year-old daughter, C.J., had been turning to drugs, and that her husband had an affair. Can this family come together to save C.J.?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Most kids dream of growing up and moving away from home, but what happens when your adult children still haven't flown the coop? Dr. Phil gives family freeloaders a wake-up call.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Jethro gets his draft notice, Jed decides he should pay what it costs the Army to train inductees. When Mr. Drysdale hears this, he starts figuring how he can get Jethro out on a Section 8.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro reports to the induction center after getting his draft notice. The Army isn't quite sure what to make of Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Since Granny can't plant crops in their yard, Jed thinks the solution is to buy her a plot a land somewhere else. He figures a place called Happy Acres is the best spot to buy land, not realizing it's a cemetery.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro thinks he wants to be a naval frogman, but Granny is concerned her tonic has transformed him. Mr. Drysdale, concerned about finances, has Miss Jane distract Jethro with comics, causing him to want to fly to the moon.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro heads down to the Reserves HQ while wearing an ancestor's Confederate Army uniform. The Sergeant thinks he's an actor there to participate in a Civil War reenactment. Jethro runs home to tell Granny the Civil War is still on.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Col. Blake asks the actor playing Gen. Grant to play along with Granny so that the Civil War movie can continue. Meanwhile, Jethro uses his 6th grade education to take the written test to enter the Reserves.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro believes his moment for Hollywood stardom has arrived. Casting for Bachelor Sheriff Knows Best is occurring, and Jethro mistakenly thinks he has been chosen.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny competes against Mrs. Drysdale as artists and tells Jed about her uncle, the barn painter. Jed and Jethro go to an upscale gallery to buy a painting, but are mistaken for gardeners. Bessie the chimp dabbles with a paintbrush.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After Ellie seems to be no longer interested in Dash Riprock Granny decides it's time to do a little matchmaking. She thinks the handsome actor would be perfect for Miss Jane.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale talks the Clampetts into hiring a housekeeper. Unfortunately, the housekeeper that is hired is uninterested in doing housework.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro decides to turn his favorite thing, eating, into a job by getting the family involved in buying a diner. The family's choice of offerings lead to a lack of customers, so Mr. Drysdale tries to fix things.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro, worried that his diner the Hungry Gizzard has no customers, has a wonderful idea. He busts in on Mr. Drysdale trying to impress the wealthy Vanderpools, announcing the restaurant is going topless. Confusion ensues.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants to leave sunny California because she misses winter, sending Mr. Drysdale into a panic. The banker enlists Miss Jane in an elaborate scheme to convince the Clampetts that a blizzard has occurred.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The last televised wrestling match was such a success that the promoter wants a rematch. Granny isn't interested until Rebecca's parents visit.

programme.desc: Granny is on the warpath concerning the chaos caused by Ellie's critters and declares either they go or she does. Mr. Drysdale is equally irritated by the expense of his wife's poodle. Jed tries to find a solution.

programme.desc: Simon and his new girlfriend Tara are on a double date with Will and her friend Kerry.

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Simon and his new girlfriend are going to visit her sister at university, the other boys invite themselves along.

programme.title: Monty Python's Flying Circus
programme.desc: World revolutionaries are quizzed about football scores; figures from works of art go on strike throughout galleries in England; the search continues for a cure for over-acting; Viking marauders kidnap Englishmen who ask for canned ham.

programme.title: Monty Python's Flying Circus
programme.desc: Miners brawl over historical facts; hospital patients serve the doctors; five shipwrecked mariners decide whom they will have for dinner.

programme.title: Monty Python's Flying Circus
programme.desc: A courteous murderer wins a suspended sentence by virtue of his charm; a search for Paris by way of Iceland is interrupted by a plane crash and a shipwreck. Also: how to dispose of pets before going on vacation.

programme.title: Monty Python's Flying Circus
programme.desc: A couple investigate the cultural similarities between two London districts, seven miles apart; schoolboys' extracurricular activities are examined; a TV farming club comments on Tchaikovsky.

programme.title: Drop The Dead Donkey: A Clash of Interests
programme.desc: The management and newsreaders clash over petty issues.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: A stranger stops dead in his tracks when he sees Ruth in the village, and later he spies on her when she is having a coffee with Caroline. Ruth is not sure why, but she starts feeling uneasy.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa wants Martin to engage more with James, so she arranges for him to take their baby to playgroup. There, he must pair up with a mother and daughter and sing songs.

programme.title: The Grand
programme.desc: A former school-friend of surviving daughter Adele comes to The Grand, supposedly to convalesce after an operation.

programme.title: The Grand
programme.desc: John Bannerman is bitten by a stray dog and the doctor tells him he may have caught rabies.

programme.title: The Grand
programme.desc: Ruth is annoyed that Marcus is organizing her life, so she asks him why he is marrying her.

programme.title: The Grand
programme.desc: Monica is sentenced to hang and Kate accuses Esmee of being responsible for her fate.

programme.title: Peak Practice
programme.desc: Change is in the air at the practice. Can Will's new job take him away from Cardale forever? Or will an unexpected change of heart lead to a departure?

programme.title: Peak Practice
programme.desc: Six months have passed and there's no sign of Jack and Beth. Will struggles to hold things together with help from Andrew and new locum Dr. Erica Matthews.

programme.title: Peak Practice
programme.desc: The plight of a pregnant teenager reopens wounds between Andrew and wife Kirsty. Erica is thrilled to have Will as her new landlord, but does she hanker after something more with him?

programme.title: Peak Practice
programme.desc: Andrew persuades Erica to have a housewarming party in order to lure Will, but unbeknown to both of them he's been enjoying secret dates with Dr. Kate Webster.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Mrs. Tishell returns to the village. Martin has to work out what is wrong with beachcomber Lorna. Al and Morwenna have an internet dating disaster, and romance is blossoming for Bert and Jennifer.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Hypochondriac Malcolm Rayner is struggling with his breathing and Martin asks him if he has ever worked with asbestos.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Al receives a visit from two military policemen who are trying to track down Baby James's babysitter, Mike Pruddy.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa is leaving for Spain. Bert and Jennifer's engagement party goes off with a bang. Al is hailed as a hero for saving Caroline's life.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran víctimas en Filadelfia en un estilo similar al de El replicador, el acosador que ha estado siguiendo cada movimiento de BAU, el equipo piensa que esta podría ser la oportunidad que necesitan para tratar de detenerlo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Día de las madres
programme.desc: Los secretos surgen cuando la ex suegra de Gibbs aparece como testigo en la investigación de un asesinato.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Doble identidad
programme.desc: El equipo investiga el asesinato de un marine y descubre más cosas sobre su vida de las que nadie habría imaginado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Jurisdicción
programme.desc: El equipo descubre sorprendentes similitudes entre ellos y sus homólogos del CGIS cuando aparece muerto un buzo de la Marina que buscaba un tesoro hundido.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Placer culpable
programme.desc: La muerte de un oficial de la Marina lleva a Gibbs y al equipo al mundo de las prostitutas de lujo, confiando en la madame Holly Snow para que les ayude a atrapar a un asesino.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Almas perdidas
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el asesinato de un conductor ebrio que mató a una madre y su hijo, Danny y Baez se debaten entre cumplir con su deber y buscar justicia al descubrir la conexión entre el sospechoso y la víctima.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Apuesta alta
programme.desc: Cuando el hermano de Linda, Jimmy (Kevin Dillon), se mete en problemas con la mafia, le suplica a Danny que lo ayude a mantenerse a salvo hasta que la situación se calme

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La sombra de la duda
programme.desc: Jamie y Eddie investigan cuando una mujer sufre una reacción alérgica a su medicación y descubren que su esposo, un técnico de emergencia, no respondió a la llamada de emergencia pese a estar asignado para hacerlo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Un triste adiós
programme.desc: Danny investiga las circunstancias de la desaparición de una ex oficial de la Policía de Nueva York que desaparece al día siguiente de revelarle que planeaba hacer las paces con la mujer que ella y su compañero condenaron injustamente años atrás.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran víctimas en Filadelfia en un estilo similar al de El replicador, el acosador que ha estado siguiendo cada movimiento de BAU, el equipo piensa que esta podría ser la oportunidad que necesitan para tratar de detenerlo.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La BAU investiga a las víctimas que documentaban sus vidas personales y sus deseos internos en publicaciones de blogs y redes sociales. Además, Kevin se pone celoso cuando descubre que García puede tener un nuevo interés en el amor.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige al viejo barrio de Morgan en la ciudad de Chicago en busca de un sujeto cuyo objetivo son los hombres de mediana edad. Y una pista lleva a Morgan a creer que van tras alguien relacionado con el hombre que abusó de él cuando era niño.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando 25 años después se abre una cápsula del tiempo en un pequeño pueblo de Colorado y contiene una revelación espantosa, la UAC investiga ese crimen y un posible vínculo con la muerte de un oficial de policía local.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Placer culpable
programme.desc: La muerte de un oficial de la Marina lleva a Gibbs y al equipo al mundo de las prostitutas de lujo, confiando en la madame Holly Snow para que les ayude a atrapar a un asesino.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: With the Run for a Million just around the corner, the top riders meet at the NHRA Derby for one final test before Vegas. The underdogs are out to prove they are a force to be reckoned with against the top contenders.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: The moment has finally arrived as the sport's best riders gather in Vegas with their eyes on the top prize. The excitement and tension are high as these riders know that one perfect ride could change their lives forever.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Bill Simcox is a strong believer in family and community he takes pride in driving for his wife and two kids.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Ed and Linda should be spending their golden years relaxing. Instead, they spend most days and nights working on the road, miles from home and family.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Stacy Toney was on a route when Katrina devastated the New Orleans area last fall. Amazingly his home escaped major damage but his brother was not as lucky.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Check it out, as the Chrome Shop Mafia get spiritual; transforming his run down Freightliner FLD into Richard's own personal sanctuary.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Mark Ferguson, his wife Kim and their three year old daughter Katelyn are homeless; crammed inside his 95 Pete 379. Don't miss as the Chrome Shop Mafia transform Mark's rundown ride into a home he and his family can finally be proud of.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Frank Russell suffers from Lyme disease, and its side effects greatly affected Frank's ability to drive a truck. Get ready, as the Mafia rips Frank's old Kenworth apart to create a living breathing bio-mechanical truck as tough as the man who drives it.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: The Baize brothers transport military supplies. Because their cargo is top secret, they must guard the rig at all times. The Mafia turns the truck into the ultilmate transport!

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: The Chrome Shop Mafia steps in and turns Michael Watkins' truck into a beautiful memorial to his son.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Michael Condron's truck transforms into something straight ou of an action movie and the inside becomes a state of the art movie theatre.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: The Chrome Shop Mafia wants this trucker to get a good night's sleep. Check it out as they update Don Scott's seats and turn his truck into an icon of Midwestern Americana.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: The Chrome Shop Mafia kick their creative juices into high gear and fast forward Sylvester Thompson's truck into the future.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: The Chrome Shop Mafia gives Kevin and Gail a getaway truck straight out of the 1930s. Don't miss it, as the Mafia takes a totally custom design and riddle it with bullet holes.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Matthew Graves is a loving father and sole provider of six children. He'is never home; working weekends and most holidays. Watch as they transform Matthew's overworked Peterbilt into an iconic monster truck befitting of the "Graves" family.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Joseph Poole had a distinguished career in Vietnam, Joseph took to the highways and has been trucking for the past thirty-one years. He wants kids to know that driving a truck is a noble profession that contributes to the prosperity of America.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Wes Adier used to ride bulls in the rodeo circuit, but he and his wife, Gloria, run a small trucking business to care for their five children. Wes's wife wants to repay all of his sacrifices and the Chrome Shop Mafia are happy to take up the challenge.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Mark Phillips' love for trucking nearly cost him his life. He was in a near fatal accident that paralyzed him from the waste down. Don't miss it as the Chrome Shop Mafia reward Mark for his determination.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Mike Shaw is known in his circle of friends as a man who helps people. Mike's good friend, Colin, was involved in a devastating trucking accident. The Chrome Shop Mafia team up with Colin to give Mike a truck fit for a king.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Catch the Chrome Shop Mafia at their finest, as they trick Robert's battered Kenworth into a mobile fortress that no one will want to mess with.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Ken England drives with the burden of two people's medical bills on his shoulders, and he could use some good news. The Mafia transforms his truck into a classic 50's diner.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Jeff Magill drives a dump truck locally to his town's quarry. With all his money in the truck, Jeff's had to postpone marrying Brandi, the girl he's loved since he was 12. The Chrome Shop Mafia makes his dump truck stronger than ever.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Terry Cuneo was diagnosed with an incurable lung disease, Because Terry's medication and treatments are so expensive, he can't afford to be sidelined from any trucking jobs.The Chrime Shop turns Terry's pink Freightliner into a classic Pullman rail car.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Five years ago, Rudy Briscoe was dealt a terrible blow; his youngest son, Brian, was diagnosed with cancer. Tune in, as the Chrome Shop Mafia give father and son a truck based on their love of classic cars.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Harry Joe Hooper served as a trucker in the Korean War and then worked as his county's undertaker for 55 years. The Chrome Shop Mafia wants these traveling do-gooders to have a truck that truly represents the service they provide to our country.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An ATV driver leads deputies on a wild chase, a woman tries to ditch a bag of hard drugs, and an assault suspect is caught off guard by an incriminating voicemail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A chatty motorist becomes agitated when officers start asking questions, a fleeing driver calls his wife in the middle of a pursuit, and deputies catch a man in a lie.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers tackle a man carrying other people's credit cards, two women deny ownership of drug paraphernalia found in their bags, and police mediate a father-son dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop takes a surprising turn when a suspect creates a spur-of-the-moment diversion, and a soft-spoken driver has difficulty being upfront with the officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An innocent conversation turns into a high-speed motorcycle chase, a driver gets ratted out by his passengers, and a series of bad decisions land a young man in hot water.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police deploy Tasers after a suspect tries to flee, a man denies committing a crime in front of detectives, and an officer supervises a chaotic business transaction.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect resisting arrest draws a crowd, a homeless man decides to camp out in someone's house while they're in the hospital and a traffic stop results in a drug arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect collides with another driver while fleeing from police, deputies mediate an altercation over a bag of chips, and officers respond to a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young girl may be the victim of a sexual assault. An officer spots a speeding motorcycle and attempts a routine stop. Officers serve a violation of domestic violence warrant on an inebriated guest at a local hotel.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver leaves her car during a routine traffic stop, officers stop a car that appears to have fake tags, and police respond to an altercation between a father and son.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers assist on a call regarding a fight at a local residence. On a felony stop a juvenile male with a firearm is detained. Officers respond to a report of a man firing a gun in front of his residence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Recovery of a stolen vehicle uncovers a weapon and a lengthy criminal history. Detectives cross paths with a car that was stolen in a carjacking. Officers speak with a man who has questionable standards regarding gun safety.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Meth and alcohol cloud the tragic accusations between husband and wife. A man learns why you should report if you recover your stolen vehicle. A woman says heroin is the only thing that can heal her.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A very cooperative car thief tells deputies all about his good fortune. An argument over business leaves one man on the ground with a bloody mouth. The occupants of a truck are oblivious to what deputies find in the backseat.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer spots a suspect returning to an area to pick up a hidden stash of narcotics. An officer learns that occupants of a suspicious vehicle has outstanding warrants. A domestic battery is investigated and justice is served.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police track a possible stolen vehicle, a man upset with his neighbors takes matters into his own hands, and officers try to placate a man holding a knife to his own throat.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man crashes his vehicle after losing control while attempting to evade the police. An eldery woman with an outstanding DUI warrant is arrested for hit and run. Officers discover methamphetamine while investigating two suspicious vehicles.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop leads to an altercation with an armed passenger, a man is accused of assault while searching for marijuana, and a woman on probation has mismatched plates.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The owner of a truck discovers what happens when you don’t lock your door. Police level with a troubled man and implore him to make better choices. An officer acts as a therapist for multiple people and their relationships.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A skittish driver’s decision results in a trip to the hospital. A car full of young men swear they were trying to escape an imminent threat. An innocent woman struggles with the decision to press charges on her friend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A high-speed pursuit ends in a foot chase. Stolen property is found in a suspect’s car during a traffic stop. An altercation ends with a brick being tossed at a victim’s car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An out-of-control driver wants to get home for his child's birthday, officers respond to a suspected shooting, and a trip to buy dog food turns into a run-in with the police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police arrest a suspect for armed robbery. A six foot alligator is found on a homeowner's back porch. An Officer assists in an undercover sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers arrest a couple during an argument over who the narcotics belong to. Police seize a large bag of marijuana after a routine stop. A man is caught harboring drugs under his tongue during questioning.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer pulls over a man making hand gestures at him while driving, an ex-Marine explains his side of a fight, and a traffic stop reveals a truck full of dogs and drugs.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wild-eyed man leads police on a chase that ends in a Tasing, officers respond to an in-progress lovers' spat, and a traffic stop results in drug and auto theft charges.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police deploy spike strips to put an end to a dangerous stolen vehicle pursuit. An alleged mechanic says he has permission to drive a semi-truck — the owner says otherwise. A couple stops a woman from driving away in their car.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A man accused of murdering his wife and co-workers leads the CSIs on a wild chase through a busy Vegas casino.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team rallies around one of their own, who is shot in the line of duty and may not survive on the sixth season finale.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: While Grissom leads a group of college students on a tour of CSI, the dead speak while the CSIs investigate, each narrating their own case

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate first-hand the behind-the-scenes action of Cirque du Soleil in order to determine what may have contributed to a young dancer's untimely death.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom is fascinated when every detail of a miniature is identical to that of a real crime scene, and he goes about trying to solve the case using the clues provided.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When an innocent man is brutally attacked and beaten to death by what looks like a monster in a black cape, the CSIs are called to investigate, only to learn that a similar attack took place minutes later.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a dead woman is found hanging from a cross inside a church, the team follows the evidence to uncover a bizarre love triangle dating all the way back to the victim's high school days.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When two young boys are reported missing, a known neighborhood sex offender is the primary suspect.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: While investigating an elderly woman's murder, Grissom receives a miniature crime scene replica; Greg attends a hearing to ascertain his culpability in a teenager's accidental death.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When identical twins are found dead, the evidence in both cases does not immediately prove a connection between the two deaths. However, as the CSIs dig deeper into the histories of the women, a surprising twist takes the investigation in a new direction.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate a string of murders in Las Vegas that may be tied to an infamous mob boss from the 1970s who disappeared many years ago.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSIs process clues after a murder at a poultry manufacturing plant, the evidence leads them to the home of a man who collects miniature trains and other miniature paraphernalia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine's testimony in court is not enough to convict a killer suspected of murdering his own mother. Adam Novak, with whom Catherine had a brief romantic encounter, is the lawyer who represents the killer and secures his freedom.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The lead suspect for the high-profile murder of anti-drug crusading assemblyman Danilo Zamesca is Thomas Simon, the west coast's biggest drug supplier.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick se pone al mando por primera vez cuando el equipo investiga el asesinato del estafador, que ha huido con el dinero de unos turistas sólo para ser tiroteado y asesinado en el aparcamiento.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI es llamado cuando un famoso empresario inmobiliario aparece muerto en el ascensor de un hotel.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y Sara son llamados a la escena del crimen cuando dos víctimas de asesinato aparecen ocultas en las tuberías de una obra en construcción en medio de un campo de alfalfa, mientras Catherine y Nick investigan un ostensible accidente de caza.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La némesis de Grissom, el asesino en serie Paul Millander, reaparece y se cobra una tercera víctima en este apasionante episodio.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un secuestrador ordena a Catherine que acompañe a un hombre que debe entregarle un rescate de un millón de dólares o, de lo contrario, matará a la amante del hombre.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom investiga el asesinato de un fotógrafo de Las Vegas cuyos restos fueron arrojados a una granja de cadáveres cercana.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Catherine y Sara tienen que investigar la muerte de un jugador de hockey durante un entrenamiento. Warrick y Nick investigan la aparente muerte relacionada con las drogas de un saxofonista en un casino.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom investiga los asesinatos de cuatro monjes que fueron tiroteados a quemarropa mientras cantaban en un templo budista.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un autobús que transportaba 23 pasajeros de Los Ángeles a Las Vegas se estrella a menos de 40 millas de su destino, matando a nueve personas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Jane Galloway está a punto de sufrir un ataque de nervios. Se ha protegido completamente del mundo exterior, pero eso no impide que un acosador en su ático la mate.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y Catherine investigan la muerte a puñaladas de una anciana de 80 años que vivía en una casa destartalada llena de gatos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y Sara investigan cuando el cadáver de un hombre, que ha sido rociado con lejía, aparece enterrado en un parque.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo se ocupan de su caso más importante hasta la fecha cuando el antiguo jefe de detectives de la ciudad es asesinado al estilo ejecución en su casa tras una fiesta salvaje.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Los CSI investigan cuando se descubre el cadáver de una joven no identificada metido en un carrito de la compra volcado cerca de un paso subterráneo de la autopista.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a skydiver is murdered, the CSIs discover that he has more than 100 children and all of them are suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the sisters of a Miami sorority are knocked off one by one, the CSIs try to end the murder spree.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a neighborhood do-gooder is murdered, Horatio and the CSIs discover that he was planning to blow the whistle on something big.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the Miami Taunter kills again, Horatio comes face-to-face with the matriarch of the suspected killer's family, who may or may not help his investigation.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a beloved tennis coach is nearly killed, Calleigh discovers a personal connection to the case.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio uncovers a corruption scandal that pits him against an old adversary, and Calleigh makes a life-changing decision.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When one of the CSI's biggest enemies is murdered, Horatio must determine which of his team members is a suspect.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Megan Donner returns to the CSI unit in time to work on a jet crash in the Everglades. They discover a victim five miles from the crash.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After fishermen catch a tiger shark and discover a partial human torso in its stomach, evidence leads the team to suspect murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a rape and a murder takes place on a Miami beach, Horatio and the team are sent to investigate the mansion of the Hamilton family.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When his mentor is killed while defusing a bomb, Horatio goes on a personal mission to find the culprit. Megan wonders if he is too close to the case.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a priest is murdered, Horatio and the team must investigate. A lip print on a drinking glass sets a 12-year-old altar boy as a prime suspect.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A 5-year-old girl is murdered at a restaurant/playland catering to parents and children, and Horatio and the team must investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the team investigate the murder of a male stripper found dead after a female sex party. Evidence suggests he had sex prior to his death.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Después de que Internet convierte a una alumna de secundaria en un símbolo sexual internacional, la información divulgada sobre Horatio pone su vida en peligro.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI buscan exhaustivamente al hijo de Horatio después de que desaparece durante una sorprendente y mortal fuga de prisión.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Asesinan a una leyenda del deporte y la investigación se complica cuando el laboratorio pierde el cuerpo. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Acontecimientos extraños empiezan a afectar al equipo de CSI mientras persiguen a un asesino en serie que atacó durante un eclipse total de sol.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando una modelo se electrocuta en la pasarela, el caso lleva a Horatio y al equipo de CSI de vuelta al hijo de Horatio y a su archienemigo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando unas vacaciones familiares se vuelven mortales, el equipo de CSI debe encontrar al asesino antes de que los supervivientes hagan justicia por mano propia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un atentado contra la vida de Calleigh pone en peligro su vida personal y profesional. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El estilo de vida de los ricos y famosos está bajo el microscopio de Horatio y el equipo de CSI cuando la niñera de una familia adinerada aparece muerta.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando una ametralladora rara e ilegal evapora a tres contrabandistas de armas, el equipo de CSI debe encontrar al asesino antes de que el arma cause más muertes.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: La ex de Horatio, y madre de Kyle, resurge en Miami como la viuda de un multimillonario que hará cualquier cosa para recuperar a su hijo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el asesinato de una mujer, el equipo de CSI descubre un laboratorio de metanfetamina en su apartamento y a un agente del FBI sin escrúpulos con una vida secreta propia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan un asesinato en una boda, las pistas finalmente llevan a los CSI a un club de striptease local.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El pasado de Horatio vuelve para perseguirlo cuando Julia lo arresta por asesinato. El equipo de CSI debe investigar para absolverlo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio enfrenta fantasmas de su pasado, el equipo corre contra el tiempo para salvar a Calleigh de un grupo de peligrosos secuestradores.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the murder of a groom on his wedding day and the appearance of a mysterious box on the hood of Stella’s car.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac travels to Chicago in order to solve the mystery of the 333 caller while the rest of the CSI team works on a murder in a subway car.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a wealthy man in a hip nightclub and the inadvertent shooting of a young boy during a robbery.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the murder of the owner of a posh hotel as well as the death of a teenager that seems to be connected to Peter Pan.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: After a young woman and a prominent judge are murdered, the CSI team works to discover the connection between the two crimes.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a street luger and the mysterious drowning of a woman in a self-sanitizing pay bathroom.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a trained female assassin comes to New York City, she really puts the CSI New York team members’ abilities to the test.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The kidnapping of a little girl and a fire set to her apartment building leaves CSI New York team member Stella feeling guilty and homeless.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A shark washes up on shore unloading a dead body and a bizarre crime scene that leaves the CSI New York team more than puzzled.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A high school dance is interrupted by the killing of the school’s guidance counselor. Meanwhile, the taxi cab serial killer is still on the loose.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A professional basketball game ends early after a fan is chosen for the million dollar half court shot where he makes it and inexpediently dies.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The taxi cab killer whom the CSI New York team has been trying to catch strikes again, only this time it’s at the expense of a New Jersey cop.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A bank robbery has Mac doing crime investigation from inside to help the robber prove he didn’t kill one of the hostages.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The bank robbery saga from last season continues as Mac seeks revenge after nearly being killed by the mysterious Joe.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Juego mortal
programme.desc: Cuando los pacientes de un psiquiatra son asesinados sistemáticamente, el equipo de CSI se ve obligado a seguir el juego Cluedo para atrapar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Prueba de honor (S9 Ep8)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI debe adentrarse en el mundo de alta presión de las escuelas preparatorias de elite cuando un estudiante es asesinado mientras estudia para el examen de ingreso a la universidad.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Código sangriento (S9 Ep9)
programme.desc: Cuando descubren que la detective Lovato es una agente encubierta, el equipo de CSI investiga a la pandilla callejera latina en la que ella se infiltró.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Fantasmas del pasado (S9 Ep10)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York investiga un bar clandestino inspirado en la década de 1920 cuando asesinan a uno de sus dueños y desaparecen 10.000 dólares.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Control P (S9 Ep11)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York se enfrenta a un misterio desconcertante cuando dos víctimas diferentes están vinculadas por la misma arma poco común.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Mentiras piadosas (S9 Ep12)
programme.desc: Cuando un querido oficial de policía de Nueva York fuera de servicio fallece en un robo, el equipo de CSI usa el arte del interrogatorio para doblegar a sus sospechosos y llegar a la verdad.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El edificio 913 (S9 Ep13)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga cuando encuentran a un hombre enmascarado al pie de un rascacielos de mala fama conocido por su historia de muertes misteriosas.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Oro blanco (S9 Ep14)
programme.desc: Cuando secuestran a un joven pizzero, el equipo de CSI de Nueva York debe determinar qué buscaban realmente los perpetradores.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Seth y Apep (S9 Ep15)
programme.desc: Mac y el equipo se asocian con D.B. Russell para aventajar a los secuestradores de Christine antes de que se les acabe el tiempo para salvarle la vida.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Mi sangriento Valentín (S9 Ep16)
programme.desc: En el Día de San Valentín, el detective Mac Taylor y el resto del equipo de CSI de Nueva York abordan tres retorcidas historias de amor que salieron mal.

programme.title: CSI: New York: La vida es hoy (S9 Ep17)
programme.desc: El malestar de la comunidad debido a un policía que mató a un hombre desarmado obliga a Mac y al equipo de CSI de Nueva York a actuar rápidamente para resolver el caso.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Piso 34 (S7 Ep1)
programme.desc: El miembro más nuevo del equipo de CSI de Nueva York, como bienvenida, se topa con una mujer asesinada en el edificio del laboratorio de criminalística de la policía de Nueva York.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Plática poco amigable (S7 Ep2)
programme.desc: Cuando una joven parece ser estrangulada mientras está en un chat en vivo que Adam presencia, el equipo de CSI debe determinar si fue real o una broma.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Condenado, si lo haces (S7 Ep3)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran a una pareja golpeada en su casa, el equipo de CSI cree que tiene al sospechoso después de que una madre identifica a su hijo, pero no todo es lo que parece.

programme.title: La maldición de la llorona
programme.desc: Una joven hereda una mansión, solo para descubrir que está hechizada por brujas y espíritus malignos.

programme.title: Santo contra Capulina
programme.desc: Capulina es un gran admirador del campeón El Santo, quien ayuda a la policía en su tiempo libre. Un científico crea un robot idéntico a Capulina para matar a El Santo, y pronto se enfrentan en la arena.

programme.title: Los astronautas
programme.desc: En el planeta Venus, el líder del sindicato de maridos oprimidos desea que se devuelva de nuevo el poder a los hombres.

programme.title: Los Legionarios
programme.desc: Viruta y Capulina huyen disfrazados de mujer de la legión extranjera, pero los confunden con esclavas y son vendidos para el harem del príncipe Omar. La odalisca Farida los descubre y avisa al sultán, quien los manda a decapitar.

programme.title: Desde mi cielo
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a la adolescente de 14 años Susie Salmon, ella deja atrás una vida inconclusa. Ahora, desde su lugar en un extraño pero hermoso mundo intermedio, ella debe ayudar a su padre a atrapar a su asesino.

programme.title: Seis grados de separación
programme.desc: Haciéndose pasar por el hijo de un famoso actor, un joven desconocido (Will Smith) entra hábilmente en el mundo elitista de los marchantes de arte (Stockard Channing, Donald Sutherland) y pone en marcha algo que cambiará sus vidas para siempre.

programme.title: ¡Madre!
programme.desc: Jennifer Lawrence y Javier Bardem ofrecen actuaciones inolvidables en ¡Madre!, el elogiado trabajo de Darren Aronofsky. ¡Experimenta el suspenso psicológico visualmente deslumbrante que dejará tu corazón latiendo y te volará la cabeza!

programme.title: Buscando un hogar
programme.desc: Una adolescente embarazada y sin hogar huye de su madre abusiva y busca a su padre biológico.

programme.title: Te amaré en silencio
programme.desc: Basada en el éxito teatral de Broadway, esta es la inspiradora historia de John Leeds, un maestro idealista de educación especial, y una obstinada joven sorda, Sarah. Al poco tiempo, la relación entre el maestro y su alumna se convierte en amor.

programme.title: ¿A quién ama Gilbert Grape?
programme.desc: Ocuparse de Arnie es una tarea que puede ser bastante demandante para Gilbert, al menos mientras trabaja en la tienda local.

programme.title: Número De Suerte
programme.desc: John Travolta y Lisa Kudrow forman un "equipo de comedia de alta energía" en esta comedia divertida inspirada en una estafa de la vida real para ganar la lotería de Pensilvania.

programme.title: Treintona, soltera y fantástica
programme.desc: Una mujer en sus treinta y tantos años se descubre a sí misma a través de la vida, el amor y el corazón roto.

programme.title: En nombre del amor
programme.desc: De Nicholas Sparks, el autor best-seller, llega esta conmovedora historia sobre hasta dónde estamos dispuestos a llegar para mantener viva la esperanza del amor.

programme.title: La Mexicana
programme.desc: Un hombre trata de llevar a través de la frontera una antigua pistola llamada La Mexicana, que se cree que está maldita, mientras su novia lo presiona para que abandone sus costumbres criminales.

programme.title: Atlas de geografia humana
programme.desc: Fran, Rosa, Ana y Marisa deben armar un atlas de geografía. Sus vidas predecibles están a punto de cambiar a partir de ahora. Mientras trabajan en el atlas, experimentan el amor, el desamor, la infidelidad y la reconciliación.

programme.title: Solteras indisponibles
programme.desc: Tres niñas pequeñas, mejores amigas, conocen a un hechicero que les concede un deseo: tener la misma suerte en el amor. Varios años después, cada una de ellas tiene su propia vida hasta que un día un evento inesperado cambia sus destinos

programme.title: Las estafadoras
programme.desc: Una mujer y su hija son estafadoras profesionales que utilizan sus armas de seducción para engañar a millonarios, hasta que la joven hija se enamora poniendo en apuros el último golpe: un excéntrico magnate del tabaco.

programme.title: Ip Man 2
programme.desc: ternacional Donnie Yen repite su papel icónico como el gran maestro de kung fu, Ip Man.

programme.title: Ip Man 3
programme.desc: Donnie Yen regresa a la exitosa serie de artes marciales de Ip Man. Cuando un desarrollador de bienes raíces corrupto (Mike Tyson) y su pandilla brutal intentan tomar control de la ciudad, Master Ip decide luchar contra ellos.

programme.title: Master Z: el legado de Ip Man
programme.desc: Tras su derrota ante el maestro Ip, Cheung Tin Chi, hace su vida con su hijo pequeño en Hong Kong, sirviendo mesas en un bar que atiende a expatriados. La mezcla de extranjeros, dinero y líderes de tríadas no tarda en atraerle de nuevo a la lucha.

programme.title: La suburban dorada
programme.desc: Un policía judicial es acusado de estar relacionado con el narcotráfico solo por ayudar a su primo. Las circunstancias lo convierten en un fugitivo de la ley y por recuperar a su hijo tiene que involucrase con el narcotráfico.

programme.title: Domino
programme.desc: Para buscar justicia por el asesinato de su compañero, un agente de policía de Copenhague (Nikolaj Coster-Waldau) y un compañero se embarcan en una misión mortal para dar caza a un misterioso hombre en este trepidante thriller de acción.

programme.title: Terminator 2: juicio final
programme.desc: La máquina no humana que domina la élite del futuro devastado por la guerra despacha un cíborg asesino al pasado para matar a un jovencito porque pronto será el líder de la resistencia en contra de la máquina.

programme.title: El infierno
programme.desc: Benny ha sido deportado de los Estados Unidos a México, que está siendo destrozado por las guerras de los carteles de droga. Luego se involucra en el negocio del narcotráfico y comienza a subir de rango.

programme.title: Mañana es hoy
programme.desc: Verano de 1991. Toda la familia Gaspar está de vacaciones y, de repente, acaban transportados al 2022. ¿Lograrán regresar a los años 90?

programme.title: Argentina, 1985
programme.desc: A legal team takes on the heads of Argentina's bloody military dictatorship during the 1980s in a battle against odds and a race against time.

programme.title: Bala mordida
programme.desc: Mauro Hernández es un joven policía que bajo las órdenes de su comandante se ve involucrado en un intercambio de droga.

programme.title: Amor, dolor & viceversa
programme.desc: Una película de crimen y suspenso sobre sueños inquietantes que se convierten en realidad para dos personas.

programme.title: Abre los ojos
programme.desc: César es un casanova exitoso enamorado de la belleza Sophia (Penélope Cruz), pero una ex celosa lo involucra en un accidente que le destruye la cara.

programme.title: Hazlo como hombre
programme.desc: Mauricio Ochmann y Aislinn Derbez protagonizan esta divertidísima comedia sobre un hombre cuyo mundo se pone patas arriba cuando su mejor amigo - y futuro cuñado - le anuncia que es gay.

programme.title: Drácula 2000
programme.desc: El maestro del terror Wes Craven presenta una adaptación moderna y sexy del clásico thriller gótico. Luego de que Drácula despierta de su sueño de 100 años, su primer destino es Estados Unidos y la exótica ciudad de Nueva Orleans.

programme.title: Cujo
programme.desc: Mientrtas Donna y Vic Trenton luchan para salvar tambaleante su matrimonio, su hijo Tad se hace amigo del adorable San Bernardo de 90 kilos de su mecánico.

programme.title: Mimic
programme.desc: Del director ganador del Óscar, Guillermo del Toro (THE SHAPE OF WATER), llega una batalla, el hombre y la naturaleza. El milagro de la ingeniería creado en el laboratorio evolucionó y comenzó a imitar al depredador más peligroso de todos: el humano.

programme.title: Mimic 2
programme.desc: Una mutación de cucarachas asesinas sorprende a la ciudad de Nueva York. Se crean imitaciones para infiltrar su grupo y acabar con ellas, pero estas evolucionan y se transforman en seres humanos para seguir acabando con la humanidad.

programme.title: Mimic 3: sentinel
programme.desc: Los bichos están de regreso en la tercera parte de Mimic. Después de que un grupo de personas comienzan a desaparecer, un hombre hipersensible a los gérmenes y confinado a una burbuja protectora pretende ser detective y descifrar el fenómeno.

programme.title: Terror al anochecer
programme.desc: En 1946, el pueblo de Texarkana sufrió una serie de experiencias traumáticas que todavía recuerda hoy, treinta años más tarde, entre marzo y mayo, cinco personas fueron asesinadas a manos de un loco enmascarado.

programme.title: Sabor a sangre y chocolate
programme.desc: Adaptación del relato de la autora Annette Curtis Klause acerca de una joven loba adolescente, que debe elegir entre su amor por un joven humano muy lindo y honrar la lealtad de la manada.

programme.title: El Loco Superdotado
programme.desc: El constantemente pobre Darryl se arriesga a perder su trabajo soñado en Wall Street hasta que encuentra un experimento que paga bien y que le otorga sentidos superhumanos... y competitividad. Pero con los efectos secundarios, ¡todo puede pasar!

programme.title: Duplex
programme.desc: Los jóvenes y vibrantes neoyorquinos Alex y Nancy encontraron un lugar perfecto para establecerse y compartir un futuro brillante: la planta baja de un hermoso y viejo dúplex. Pero su nuevo hogar viene con un accesorio permanente que no esperaban.

programme.title: Euroviaje
programme.desc: Europa nunca será la misma después de que Scotty Thomas y sus amigos aterrizan para vivir aventuras y excesos, haciendo las cosas más alocadas en el viaje más salvaje de sus vidas!

programme.title: El Loco Superdotado
programme.desc: El constantemente pobre Darryl se arriesga a perder su trabajo soñado en Wall Street hasta que encuentra un experimento que paga bien y que le otorga sentidos superhumanos... y competitividad. Pero con los efectos secundarios, ¡todo puede pasar!

programme.title: Hot Rod - Brincando el destino
programme.desc: Una comedia sobre un doble de acción que nunca aterrizó exitosamente de un salto sin aniquilarse y su intento de dominar la escena peligrosa más importante de su vida.

programme.title: La familia Perez
programme.desc: En el 1980, un dueño de una hacienda cubana es finalmente liberado tras pasar 20 años en la cárcel. Anhelando con ver a su esposa e hija, a él le permiten entrar al barco migratorio que va para Florida.

programme.title: Resaca mortal
programme.desc: Después de celebrar la próxima boda de Doug en un hotel en Laughlin, Nevada, los chicos con resaca Bradley, Ed y Zach se despiertan en una distopía futurista, al haber perdido a su amigo, Doug.

programme.title: One Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: Marlon Brando’s only time as a Directo, Rio (Marlon Brando) also called "The Kid", his mentor Dad Longworth (Karl Malden), & a third man called Doc, rob a bank of two saddlebags of gold in Sonora, Mexico.

programme.title: Hour Of The Gun
programme.desc: Director John Sturges presents a reworking of the Wyatt Earp/Doc Holliday legend and the struggle for political control of Tombstone, with a marvelous trio of antagonists: James Garner as Earp, Jason Robards as Holliday, and Robert Ryan as Clanton.

programme.title: A Fistful Of Dynamite
programme.desc: The results are explosive when an Irish terrorist (James Coburn) with a dynamite obsession teams up with a Mexican peasant-turned-revolutionary (Rod Steiger) in this action-packed tale of power and politics. Directed by the legendary Sergio Leone.

programme.title: Duel at Diablo
programme.desc: Frontier scout Jess Remsberg leads a wagon train through hostile territory to Fort Conchos. But underneath his valor, he has an ulterior motive: to settle a score with the man he believes killed his wife. James Garner and Sidney Poitier star.

programme.title: Dances With Wolves
programme.desc: After encountering and eventually being accepted by a Native American tribe, Dunbar's loyalties are put to the test when the army threatens his new home, forcing him to choose between white America or the natives he now calls his people.

programme.title: It's A Mad, Mad, Mad, Mad World
programme.desc: Spencer Tracy leads a hilariously zany cast of Hollywood's greatest comedians (including Milton Berle, Sid Caesar, Ethel Merman and Mickey Rooney) as eight vacation-bound motorists set off on a mad-cap, side-splitting race to find a stolen fortune!

programme.title: Funny Face
programme.desc: Paris, the City of Light, shines even brighter when Audrey Hepburn and Fred Astaire team up for the only time and bring their luminous starpower to this exquisite musical featuring songs by George and Ira Gershwin.

programme.title: The Fortune Cookie
programme.desc: In their very first screen pairing, Walter Matthau (who would win a Best Supporting Actor Oscar for his performance) and Jack Lemmon portray a crooked lawyer and his TV cameraman brother-in-law in this madcap tale of greed and recouping lost love.

programme.title: The World of Henry Orient
programme.desc: Peter Sellers stars as a hilariously seedy concert pianist who is nearly driven mad after he becomes the obsession of two crush-crazed schoolgirls in this poignant, funny look at innocence lost. Angela Lansbury and Paula Prentiss also star.

programme.title: The Sterile Cuckoo
programme.desc: In this romantic comedy, an eccentric girl forces a college love affair with a reluctant student. Nominated for 2 Academy Awards including Best Song "Come Saturday Morning."

programme.title: Marty
programme.desc: Ernest Borgnine won a Best Actor Oscar for his role as a Bronx butcher who gives up on love, until he meets an equally lonely school teacher in this charming story that garnered a total of four Oscars including Best Picture.

programme.title: The Miracle Worker

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Carter receives a Dear John letter and wants to join the rest of the prisoners that escape and go home.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan tricks Klink into calling forth a bomber for study, but it arrives with a complication - a German general familiar with Hogan's style.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Klink reluctantly falls in with two other Kommandants plotting against Burkhalter. Burkhalter finds out. Now Hogan must step in before Stalag 13 loses Klink the military way - by firing squad.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When Oliver (Eddie Albert) sends a sample of his soil to the State Scientific College, a report comes back that his farm contains ingredients never before found in soil. Could his soil problems just be cosmetic? Eleanor Audley guest stars.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Relying on statistics provided by the Department of Agriculture, Oliver (Eddie Albert) decides to plant wheat. But when he goes to Drucker's to buy seed, he learns the other farmers have a unique way to predict the best crop… Mrs. Ziffel's lumbago.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: After some wheeling and dealing and mending a rift between Mr. Kimball and his mother, Oliver (Eddie Albert) finally has a phone installed, but the Hooterville Phone Company installs it directly outside his bedroom window...on top of the phone pole.

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa (Eva Gabor) is shocked that Hooterville has no beauty parlor, and the Ladies' Every-Other-Wednesday Afternoon-Discussion-Club nominates her to make it happen. Of course, Oliver's mother is happy to help, even if it means underhanded tactics.

programme.title: All in the Family

programme.title: All in the Family

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Walter's worries over a business loan ruin his vacation, and then he receives word that may ruin his life.

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: An apprehensive Maude visits Walter the day after his suicide attempt, and learns of some complications that may delay his return home, on the conclusion of a three-part episode.

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Tony begins working with a new cabbie, Lucius, a former football player. Lucius inspires Tony to try to get his boxing license reinstated.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The unflappable Jim gets an unexpected jolt when a wrecking ball crashes through the wall of his condemned apartment. A disaster ensues when he is forced to move in with Louie.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: While singing at her boyfriend Troy’s nightclub, LuAnn Corbin discovers that he is being forced by a shady drug dealer from his past, Brent Shaw, to use the club as a cover to sell Ecstasy. LuAnn is torn between love and her duty as an officer.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Former Chief Detective Virgil Tibbs returns to Sparta and is instantly assigned his first case as a lawyer, representing an accused murderer, Delbert Pike. Pike claims it was self-defense, but the victim’s wife was a witness and says it was murder.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A meticulous and ruthless assassin and former government agent is hired by a rightwing cabal to murder a visiting Chinese diplomat.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Keller infiltrates a group of Vietnam War protesters, hoping to find who murdered an AWOL marine.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: An innocent man isn't worried about a new murder charge against him, but he is afraid that once the police process his fingerprints, they will learn that he is a fugitive from a 25-year-old homicide investigation.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: When five terrorists whose plan to pass through a security checkpoint at a boating dock fails, they flee taking on several hostages including Inspector Steve Keller.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A troubled teen from a broken home is suspected of shooting a friend's stepfather.

programme.desc: Mannix is on the mend after a gunshot and is given a routine assignment by his Intertect boss. When he goes into a small town to do this, Mannix finds a mystery there.

programme.title: Mannix

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A burglar steals notebooks from a psychiatrist, then double crosses his accomplice and takes the notebooks for himself. One of the patients hire Intertect after being blackmailed.

programme.title: Mannix

programme.title: Kung Fu

programme.desc: A swashbuckling sea captain (WILLIAM SHATNER) and his wife (FRANCE NUYEN) involve Caine (DAVID CARRADINE) in a macabre plot to return him to China and certain death.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A bloody dagger and a phone tap help detectives solve a 20-year-old murder case. And DNA taken from an eyelash found on a dead prostitute's body brings a killer to justice.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El ex amante de un sospechoso se presenta con una fantástica historia de asesinato, mutilación y cremación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un estudiante de posgrado de la Universidad Estatal de Michigan desapareció y se presumió muerto. Con la ayuda de un profesor de ciencias geológicas, la policía esperaba obtener información de su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer joven de repente se enferma gravemente y, finalmente, no puede caminar. Una prueba de médula ósea revela la causa: arsénico.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asistente del gerente de una carnicería de Florida es apuñalado hasta la muerte. Parece ser un robo que salió mal, pero una huella sangrienta revela que él conocía a su asesino.

programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra muerta a Wanda Mason, empleada de una tienda, los investigadores descubren que la cámara de seguridad de la tienda ha captado todo el asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra a un popular profesor de gimnasia muerto por lo que parece ser una herida de bala accidental, su familia se pone sospechosa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.desc: Lacking real family time at home, Jimmy has been spending more and more time at Ashley's house. He and Toby are like brothers and Kate's begun referring to him as her "third kid".

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Recently diagnosed with a learning disorder, an embarrassed Liberty is ashamed to tell her friends about her tutoring sessions. Emma sees one of Liberty's private sessions and, putting two-and-two together with Liberty's suspicious behaviour, asks J.T.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Sean asks Emma what she's doing tonight, Emma's thrilled - that's a date, right? But nervous Sean is unable to muster the courage to arrange the details and Emma misunderstands his hesitancy as rejection.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Paige decides to start a Spirit Squad at Degrassi, Emma can't believe that the "sexist" sport of cheerleading is being revived. But Manny, who's had years of gymnastics training and is desperate for something to help make her "cool"

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley's convinced that she and Terri are going to be the stars of the school talent show, singing her new (and incredibly earnest) ballad. Terri would rather add Paige -- and some fun sparkle -- to the act, but she's not sure how to tell Ashley that.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Faced with the pressure of passing Grade 7 on his second time around and his mother's newest threat to take him back to his unhappy life up north, Sean is beginning to slip into old, angry patterns.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Perfect Ashley is beginning to bore even herself. With their parents away for the weekend, Ashley decides to join Toby in breaking the "one-guest-each" rule and invites Paige and Hazel to join her and Terri.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Summer's over and the Degrassi kids are back…in droves. A neighbouring high school has been amalgamated with the Junior High and things are a bit of a zoo.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Summer's over and the Degrassi kids are back…in droves. A neighbouring high school has been amalgamated with the Junior High and things are a bit of a zoo.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Spike reveals the identity of the mystery man she's been dating, Emma is shocked. Mr. Simpson - her teacher! Emma claims she’s okay with it, but if that’s true, why is suddenly being so rude to Mr. Simpson?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley feels like an outcast. Nobody's willing to forget how she treated them at her party last year. Ash decides to take action, swallows her pride and apologizes to everyone. And it works. She boasts to Terri about her success- it’s like last year

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's Science Fair time at Degrassi. Emma’s a serious contender for first prize, but when the results of her experiment don't fall in line with her hypothesis, she's in a panic.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Joey is going away for the weekend with his latest girlfriend, and Craig is surprised when Joey tells him he can stay on his own – and even have the guys over! When the guys get to Craig’s for the weekend, they can’t think of much to do

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Degrassi Panthers have a new star soccer player, Spinner. His victory’s even sweeter when Paige agrees to a movie. When the losing team's defensive back, the gorgeous Dean, invites a smitten Paige to a house party, she cancels on Spinner.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Haunted by memories of her recent sexual assault, Paige is desperately trying to appear normal. A girl band contest sounds like a great distraction. Terri wants to reunite PMS—including Ashley. Paige refuses and recruits Hazel instead.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Toby is tired of being an invisible computer geek so he decides to join a sports team. Girls love wrestlers - that includes Toby’s crush Kendra. To Toby's dismay, the few extra pounds he carries put him in the same weight class as athletic Sean.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s crush on Craig has reached huge proportions and everyone’s urging her to ask him out already! But Manny’s a romantic; she thinks the guy ought to do the asking

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Grade Nine International Day is coming up and Hazel isn’t thrilled. After all, Hazel’s Jamaican and everybody loves the islands - right? When the day arrives, Hazel’s display is a hit, but she isn’t acting like herself.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma Nelson is reveling in her newest job as her mom's maid of honour and planner extraordinaire! Her mom, Spike, is marrying her high-school crush, Snake - who also just happens to be Emma's favourite teacher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma Nelson is reveling in her newest job as her mom's maid of honour and planner extraordinaire! Her mom, Spike, is marrying her high-school crush, Snake - who also just happens to be Emma's favourite teacher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco and Ellie are the best of friends. But Ellie is starting to want more…Marco though can’t seem to respond in kind. He’s more and more confused about what and who he’s looking for…

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When class clown JT acts up in Science class, his teacher Ms. Hatzilakos gives him a serious detention - assisting her with the guinea pigs all week. JT’s annoyed.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are looking up for Sean. He and Emma are back together. He’s a star on the basketball team. And he and Jimmy have buried the hatchet. Jimmy’s even invited him to a party. But the good feelings don’t last for long.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Liberty can’t believe it when she doesn’t make the Girls Floor Hockey team – she’s never failed at anything. So when Coach Hatzilakos asks her to be the Team Manager, Liberty throws all her energy into managing.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley and Jimmy are back together, but it doesn’t feel quite the same. Ash may not look the same as last year – she’s a Goth now – but Jimmy’s sure she’s still the same golden girl inside.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.
